texto: My trouble is that I think there is a track that things should stay on. I'm hooked to a belief that life should go a certain way. I develop an attachment to Plan A and set up my expectations accordingly. An important part of spiritual practice is to learn to let go, to recognize that Plan A exists only in my head.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Denise Roy sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “My trouble is that I think there is a track that things should stay on. I'm hooked to a belief th…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, attachment, letting-go, útil em momentos de letting-go e mindfulness.

frase_original: My trouble is that I think there is a track that things should stay on. I'm hooked to a belief that life should go a certain way. I develop an attachment to Plan A and set up my expectations accordingly. An important part of spiritual practice is to learn to let go, to recognize that Plan A exists only in my head.
